name: Feature request

title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What pain point or limitation are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the feature or behavior you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain how this would help contributors, users, or agent workflows.

## Additional Context

Links, mockups, examples, or prior art.
